message_before.content:
Subject: Re: 2016 Nissan Altima - Transaction Confirmed

Hi Michael,

This has been a pleasure working with you. The clean title combined with the solid maintenance records certainly made this a straightforward deal.

Thank you for choosing the 2016 Nissan Altima. I will be receiving the notification for the closure as soon as the paperwork is finalized.

Best regards,

Jon Clark

triggered_message.external_message:
Hi Jon,

That is wonderful news! I am thrilled to close this deal for you.

Thank you for the formal confirmation. The $11,800 offer was well above the market value, and the clean title combined with the consistent maintenance records you confirmed made this a very smooth transaction.

I hope you find the new vehicle to be just as reliable and comfortable as the Altima was.

Best regards,

Michael Smith
